quotes.text: The best error handling is the kind that never fires. The second best is the kind that fires with a helpful message.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product should work without JavaScript. Not because JavaScript is bad, but because resilience is good.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SaaS should work offline. Not because everyone needs offline, but because 'no internet' happens to everyone.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best entrepreneurs are the ones who can fail gracefully and come back stronger.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to recover from failure is to start something new immediately. Don't let the failure define you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build resilience is to get knocked down and get back up. Every time.
quotes.author: based
